MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS JEFFREY CONSING, JOHNNY CONSING AND ELISA CONSING'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. The complaint alleges sufficient facts to support the claim for punitive damages. (Order signed after hearing.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Cler: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
